reasoning: VIX at 26.9 in HIGH regime, rising +25.41% — fear is accelerating. No macro events today removes event-risk uncertainty. Overnight gap flat (-0.4) shows no panic gap-down, but risk_on sector rotation (XLK +1.83%, XLF +1.36%) suggests tape resilience despite elevated volatility. This divergence (high VIX + rising but risk-on rotation) indicates potential late-stage capitulation where fear is washing out. Structural bearish bias from VIX alone, but price action hints at possible exhaustion bottom forming.
key_observations: VIX at 26.9 (HIGH regime, fear elevated) + rising 25.41% = sharp acceleration in volatility
Zero macro events scheduled for 2026-03-03 — tape is free to move on technicals/sentiment alone
Overnight gap flat despite high VIX suggests overnight buyers; no gap-down capitulation selling
Sector rotation risk_on (XLK, XLF outperforming) vs VIX spike = divergence suggests possible late-stage fear washout
Premium is expensive (VIX 26.9) — bearish setups higher-probability per regime, but watch for reversal if VIX peaks intraday
